productDisplayName: Horsefly Men Grey & Blue Striped Shirt
description: Grey and blue striped shirt that has a spread collar with synthetic patches at the tips of the collar, contrast stitch detailing on the shoulders, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and an optional fold up detail that has metallic press clips, full buttoned placket, embroidered and appliqué d branding on the right chest, embroidery on the back of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with an inverted pleat, loop below the back  yoke and a curved hem
